data.title: Ghana Tightens Control Over Gold Exports As Yellow Metal Prices Surge
data.description: Gold price in Ghana crosses $3,200/oz as government centralizes control over exports; new entity, Ghana Gold Board, aims to boost revenues and regulate industry.

data.title: Charles Schwab Tells Investors To Prioritize 'Low Volatility, High Quality' Investments Amid Century-High Tariff Turmoil
data.description: As the bond market reels from the spiking yields and the surge in volatility, analysts say "Trump put" was a potential policy response to it.

data.title: Americans Brace For Job Losses As NY Fed Survey Flags Pandemic-Era Highs In Unemployment Worries
data.description: In a recent survey conducted by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, U.S. consumers have displayed growing apprehension about a potential increase in unemployment.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Gain On Reduced Uncertainty, Gold Holds Near Highs - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets end higher on Monday boosted by Apple, while concerns over pending tariffs and trade uncertainty cap gains. Most S&P 500 sectors rise.

data.title: US Stock Futures Waver After Two-Day Rally: Trump's Tariff Moves Could End A 3-Year 'Rolling Recession,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Tuesday following a two-day advance. Futures of major benchmark indices were mixed in premarket.
